creator: jkh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The user does not state which type of installation he used, but 
I will assume it was either from a DOS partition or an IDE CDROM, 
both of which are known rogues in 2.0.5 (but have been substantially 
fixed in 2.2).  If this is not the case, please reopen the PR, otherwise 
please upgrade. :-)
